title: Set HttpOnly flag on cookies
description: Cookies created without the HttpOnly flag are accessible via client-side scripts, making them vulnerable to cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks. This is especially critical for session and authentication cookies.
recommendation: Set the HttpOnly flag on sensitive cookies to prevent client-side script access.

noncompliant.description: Cookies without HttpOnly flag can be accessed by client-side scripts, making them vulnerable to XSS attacks.

compliant.description: Set HttpOnly flag on sensitive cookies to prevent client-side script access.

checks.message: Set HttpOnly flag on cookies to prevent client-side script access
